top_signals.title: Benchmark diesel down, futures market starts to tick upward
top_signals.summary:
The benchmark price of diesel used fo most fuel surcharges declined this week.

The post Benchmark diesel down, futures market starts to tick upward appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chile Lowers Copper Production Outlook, Raises Price Forecasts
top_signals.summary: Top copper supplier Chile lowered its production forecasts for this year and next, reinforcing expectations of tight global supplies that have pushed prices near record highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: MOL-Operated Woodchip Carrier HK DELIGHT Earns ‘Best Quality Ship Award;’ Marks 5 Consecutive Wins for MOL Group Vessels
top_signals.summary: Mitsui O.S.K. Lines, Ltd. announced that the Japan Federation of Pilots’ Associations (JFPA) has presented its Best Quality Ship Award for fiscal year 2025 to an MOL-operated vessel—the woodchip carrier HK DELIGHT. This marks the fifth consecutive year that an MOL-operated vessel has received this award, demonstrating the maritime community’s regard for ongoing safety initiatives ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IBIA to host reception preceding Posidonia
top_signals.summary: IBIA will host a reception on Sunday, 31 May, at the Official Residence of the South African Embassy in Athens, bringing together members of the global bunker industry during Posidonia week. The event is expected to provide a valuable opportunity to reconnect with colleagues, meet new contacts, and further strengthen relationships across the shipping and ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Professor Momoko Kitada receives IMO Gender Equality Award 2026
top_signals.summary: Maritime academic recognised for her long-standing commitment to gender equality and empowering women in the maritime industry. Japanese maritime academic and former seafarer Professor Momoko Kitada has been awarded the International Maritime Organization’s Gender Equality Award 2026. The award was presented by IMO Secretary-General Arsenio Dominguez during a ceremony held at IMO Headquarters in London ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Everllence Sees Continued Momentum for Mk10.7 Two Stroke Engines
top_signals.summary: Everllence is reporting continued momentum for its Mk10.7 two‑stroke engine platform, reflecting a market where shipowners are increasingly seeking to balance long‑term decarbonisation ambitions with near‑term energy security, fuel availability and operational resilience. The Mk10.7 platform represents Everllence’s latest generation of two‑stroke engine design, developed around classic design principles and a modular architecture that supports ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK regulator to require tech firms to tackle deepfakes, non-consensual intimate images
top_signals.summary: The regulator’s announcement said the change is being made due to the “urgent need to better protect women and girls online.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
